title: Catalyst cluster.json
description: Schema for catalyst-cluster/cluster.json — the cluster-scope config. The canonical copy lives in the private coalesce-labs/catalyst-cluster repo (schema/cluster.schema.json); this is a vendored copy kept in the catalyst repo so all three Catalyst config scopes (repo = catalyst-config.schema.json, node = machine-config.schema.json, cluster = this file) are documented and testable together (CTL-1214). The project roster (projects[]) is the relocation target for each repo's deprecated Layer-1 monitor.linear.teams[]; the node roster (roster[]) is the relocation target for the retired .catalyst/hosts.json.

roster.description: Node roster — host names that are live cluster members (HRW ownership domain).

anchorIssue.description: Linear issue key used as the cluster liveness/quota anchor.

projects.description: Project roster — the fleet's team→repo→projectKey map (relocated from each project repo's monitor.linear.teams, design §13).
